mnemonics: Cambridge Pressed S. Bubeck's 2 Books on Optimization
keyPoints: The reference is from Cambridge University Press, 2nd Edition
The topic is foundational for advanced optimization techniques
commonMistakes: Confusing the publisher (Cambridge) with other university presses like Oxford or MIT
Mistaking the edition number (2nd) for a chapter or volume number
Forgetting the author's last name (Bubeck) and recalling only the initial 'S'
